headline: Franklin Templeton Canada Announces Final Valuations for Terminated ETF Series
summary: Franklin Templeton Canada today announced the final net asset values for the ETF Series of Franklin ClearBridge International Growth Fund (TSX: FCSI) and Franklin Global Growth Fund (TSX: FGGE) (each, a "Fund" and collectively, the "Funds").
